info.title: dotnet-try
info.description: Command line tool for developers and content authors to create interactive experiences.

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: ArgumentExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: OptionExtensions.Parse, OK: Parser.Parse, OK: ParserExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParseResultExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParseResultExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

options.name: add-package-source
options.description: Specify an additional NuGet package source [default: <path>]

options.name: package
options.description: Specify a Try .NET package or path to a .csproj to run code samples with

options.name: package-version
options.description: Specify a Try .NET package version to use with the --package option

options.name: uri
options.description: Specify a URL or a relative path to a Markdown file

options.name: enable-preview-features
options.description: Enable preview features

options.name: log-path
options.description: Enable file logging to the specified directory

options.name: verbose
options.description: Enable verbose logging to the console

options.name: port
options.description: Specify the port for dotnet try to listen on

options.name: version
options.description: Show version information

options.name: help
options.description: Show help and usage information

arguments.name: root-directory
arguments.description: The root directory for your documentation [default: <path>]

options.name: id
options.description: A unique id for the agent instance (e.g. its development environment id).

options.name: production
options.description: Specifies whether the agent is being run using production resources

options.name: language-service
options.description: Specifies whether the agent is being run in language service-only mode

options.name: key
options.description: The encryption key

options.name: application-insights-key
options.description: Application Insights key.

options.name: region-id
options.description: A unique id for the agent region

options.name: log-to-file
options.description: Writes a log file

options.name: help
options.description: Show help and usage information

commands.name: demo
commands.description: Learn how to create Try .NET content with an interactive demo

options.name: output
options.description: Where should the demo project be written to?

options.name: help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: version

options.description: Enables web assembly code execution

commands.name: verify
commands.description: Verify Markdown files found under the root directory.

options.name: help
options.description: Show help and usage information

arguments.name: root-directory
arguments.description: The root directory for your documentation [default: <path>]

commands.name: publish
commands.description: Publish code from sample projects found under the root directory into Markdown files in the target directory

options.name: format
options.description: Format of the files to publish

options.name: target-directory
options.description: The path where the output files should go. This can be the same as the root directory, which will overwrite files in place.
